Next we have to work out the chart of Mercury. He is good
in 1, 3, 5, 6, 9, 10, 11 and 12 places from himself. He is in
Dhanus. So enter the marks in the appropriate Rasis. He
is good in 5, 6, 9, 11 and 12 places from the Sun. So put the
marks in Yrsabha, Mithuna, Kanya, Yrscika and Dhanus. He
is good in 2. 4. 6, 8, 10 and 11 places from the Moon. You
know the Moon is in Pisces. So count these houses from Pisces
and enter the marks therem. He is good in 1,2, 4, 7,8, 9, 10 and
1! places from Mars and Saturn. Remember that Mars and
